signals.headline: ETH ETFs Record $275M Weekly Inflows, Strongest Since January; Bitmine Buys 101,627 ETH in Largest 2026 Purchase | YES |
signals.raw:
ETH ETFs Record $275M Weekly Inflows, Strongest Since January; Bitmine Buys 101,627 ETH in Largest 2026 Purchase | YES | HIGH**  
Ethereum ETFs saw over $275 million in weekly inflows—the highest since January 2026—led by Fidelity’s FETH and BlackRock’s ETHA, coinciding with ETH price climbing 7% to nearly $2,400 amid a broader market rally.[1]  
Bitmine Immersion Technologies announced its bigges
